executive_summary.verdict: AVGO = AI networking hype. יקר מאוד לפי כל המטריקות.
executive_summary.key_insight: Price $370 vs Lynch $123 vs DCF $66 vs GF Value $240. Premium across ALL metrics.

graham.reason: Negative book value from VMware acquisition ($69B)

peter_lynch.historical_trend: Lynch grew from $55 to $123 but price grew from $35 to $370 (10x!)

dcf.historical_trend: DCF grew from $26 to $66 while price grew 10x

business_analysis.ai_networking: Custom AI chips for hyperscalers (Google, Meta)
business_analysis.moat: Design expertise, customer relationships, M&A machine

risk_factors.valuation: Premium to ALL metrics - priced for perfection
risk_factors.ai_hype: If AI spending slows, multiple compresses

bull_case.thesis: AI infrastructure spend continues. VMware synergies exceed expectations.

bear_case.thesis: AI hype fades. VMware integration stumbles. Multiple compresses.

value_investor.reason: 460% premium to DCF. Not a value play.

growth_investor.reason: Quality company but priced for perfection.

key_differentiator: Great company but AI hype has made it extremely expensive
